zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Margaret Cromwell於1418年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 奧 特倫特時，她的父親Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton28歲，母親Joane Smythe40歲。她於1437年7月8日與William Richard Smythe在英國諾廷加姆爾卡爾頓 奧 特倫特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年4月14日在她的家鄉享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Margaret Cromwell was born in 1418, in Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton, was 28 and her mother, Joane Smythe, was 40. She married William Richard Smythe on 8 July 1437, in Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 April 1467, in her hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Margaret Cromwell est née en 1418, à Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joane Smythe, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé William Richard Smythe le 8 juillet 1437, à Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Sie hat am 8. Juli 1437 in Carlton on Trent, Nottinghamshire, England William Richard Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. April 1467 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Cromwellが1418年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカールトン オン トレントで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carletonは28歳，母Joane Smytheは40歳であった。1437年7月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアカールトン オン トレントでWilliam Richard Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年4月14日に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.Hall Green, West Midlands, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 홀 그린
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Cromwell(이)가 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 칼턴  트렌트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Smythe(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1437년 7월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 칼턴  트렌트에서 William Richard Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 4월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Margaret Cromwell родилась в 1418 г. в местности карлтон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Cromwell Lord of Carleton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Smythe, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Richard Smythe 8 июля 1437 г. в местности карлтон он трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 апреля 1467 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.
